attacking_style: Attacks immediately at the base of final climbs rather than waiting for steeper gradients, exploiting early positioning chaos to establish winning margins that hold to the summit.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Final categorized climbs where early acceleration from the base can create separation; benefits from fields spread across road with hesitant positioning.
vulnerability: Unknown - limited observations available. No weakness patterns identified in single race sample.
key_patterns: Attacks at climb base rather than mid-climb, timing move when field positioning is disorganized.
Capable of sustaining solo efforts from bottom to top of final climbs without cracking.
Translates form effectively between major events (referenced post-Worlds form carrying into Tour de Suisse).
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated strong post-Worlds form translation with solo climbing victory at 2018 Tour de Suisse
